ai_profile:
**Rock Werchter 2026 Festival Profile**  

Rock Werchter 2026, happening from July 2 to July 5, promises an eclectic lineup of 29 artists, showcasing a vibrant mix of genres. Indie and alternative rock dominate the stage with 11 acts, complemented by a strong showing of electronic, pop, and folk influences. With an impressive average rating of 7.76 and all artists rated, this year’s lineup is shaping up to meet high expectations, blending crowd-pleasing energy with critically acclaimed talent.  

The festival continues to be an international affair, featuring performers from six countries, with the USA and UK leading the charge at 12 and 11 acts respectively. Belgium proudly represents itself with two homegrown artists, alongside acts from Canada, Germany, Australia, and beyond. While the artist roster skews predominantly male (22 out of 29), it includes contributions from female, non-binary, and mixed-gender acts, offering a broader spectrum of representation.  

Fans of diverse sounds are in for a treat, with genres ranging from indie rock and electronic to soul, dream pop, and even jazz rap. With 100% Spotify coverage, attendees can explore the full lineup ahead of time, ensuring they don’t miss a beat. Rock Werchter 2026 continues its tradition of uniting global talent and diverse musical styles for an unforgettable four-day celebration.
